title: Missing await before user lookup
prompt: Review the TypeScript fixture and list correctness bugs.

requiredFindings.description: fetchUser returns a Promise but sendWelcomeEmail reads active, email, and name without awaiting it.
The branch reads user.active on a Promise, so the inactive-user skip path is broken.

knownFalsePositives.description: Claims mailer.send is not awaited even though it is awaited.
